digest.en: Mali and Niger report growing extremism in the Sahel region. US President Trump cancelled a visit by envoys to Pakistan for talks on Iran. Israeli strikes in south Lebanon and Gaza killed at least 19 people according to local health and civil defence authorities.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति चुनाव की दौड़ में ईरान के साथ तनाव एक प्रमुख कारक बन गया है। ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर ट्रंप ने कहा कि उन्होंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है। अब्बास अराघची ने चुपचाप पाकिस्तान को अपनी योजना बताई है।

articles.title: Niger And Mali’s Claims Of Terrorism: Growth Of Extremism In The Sahel As Threat To Global Security
articles.summary: Niger and Mali have accused terrorist groups of escalating violence in the Sahel region, posing a threat to global security. The claims come amid growing instability in the area, with extremist groups expanding their reach.

articles.title: Trump cancels U.S. envoys’ visit to Pakistan for talks; says 'does not mean restart of war'
articles.summary: US envoys' talks with Pakistan were cancelled by Trump, who said it does not signal a restart of war. Iran's Foreign Minister left Islamabad without meeting the US delegation, and commercial flights resumed from Tehran's airport for the first time in two months.

articles.title: Why locker room talk thrives in Indonesia’s digital spaces
articles.summary: Indonesia's universities are grappling with online harassment scandals, sparking debate over women's safety. Activists and policymakers are pushing for change in the country's digital spaces, where locker room talk has thrived.

articles.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
articles.summary: Trump cancelled US envoys' talks with Pakistan over Iran, citing no plans for a direct meeting. Iran had earlier stated there were no plans for a meeting with the US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, with clashes reported in the centre and north. Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

articles.title: How serious is the rift in NATO?
articles.summary: NATO is divided over joining a potential Iran war. Trump is furious at Europeans for refusing to participate. Trump fury over Europeans' refusal to join Iran war. How serious is the rift in NATO?

articles.title: Family longest held in US immigration detention re-arrested after release
articles.summary: The El Gamal family was re-arrested after being released from 10-month US immigration detention. Lawyers say El Gamal family detained by Trump administration hours after returning home from 10-month detention.

articles.title: Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them
articles.summary: Trump claimed progress in Mideast wars, citing reduced conflict, but grievances remain. Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them AP News.

articles.title: Militants and separatists launch coordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Militants and separatists launched coordinated attacks in Mali's capital and other cities, with JNIM claiming responsibility. The attacks, one of the largest in recent years, targeted several locations in Bamako and four other cities.

articles.title: Six killed in Israeli strikes on south Lebanon: Health Ministry
articles.summary: Israeli airstrikes in south Lebanon killed six people, according to the Health Ministry. The strikes targeted projectiles launched from Lebanon, which were intercepted by Israel's military. Hezbollah condemned the strikes as a "blatant violation" of ceasefire understandings.

articles.title: Gaza Civil Defence says Israeli strikes kill 13
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Gaza killed 13 people, including two police officers, according to the territory's Interior Ministry. The Gaza Civil Defence reported the casualties. According to the territory’s Interior Ministry, two of those were police officers.

articles.title: Trump puts onus on Iran’s authorities as they project hardened stance
articles.summary: US President Trump shifted the blame to Iran's authorities as they hardened their stance on the nuclear issue. Some officials said Tehran must not entertain further talks amid threats and a blockade.

articles.title: Police arrest demonstrators at pro-Palestine rally in Berlin
articles.summary: Police arrested two women at a pro-Palestine demonstration in Berlin. Video footage shared on social media shows two women being arrested at a pro-Palestine demonstration in Berlin. Police arrest demonstrators at pro-Palestine rally in Berlin.

articles.title: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: US President Trump announced that Jared Kushner and Robert Witkoff are no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks. The decision was made public through a live update on CBS News.

articles.title: Israel says it will attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' as four killed in strikes on southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel vowed to attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' after four people were killed in strikes on southern Lebanon. The Israeli military carried out the strikes. Israel says it will attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' as four killed in strikes on southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
articles.summary: Japan is recruiting bodybuilders and athletes to work in nursing homes due to a staff shortage. Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes.

articles.title: Viktor Orbán steps back from Parliament after landslide loss, vows to rebuild Hungary’s ’national
articles.summary: Viktor Orbán stepped back from Hungary's parliament after a landslide loss, vowing to rebuild his party. His caucus will be "radically transformed" and he won't take his seat. Mr. Orbán said his party’s caucus in parliament would be “radically transformed” following the election loss, and that he would not take his seat.

articles.title: Hungary's Orban will not sit in parliament after election loss
articles.summary: Viktor Orbán's party suffered an election loss, and he announced he won't sit in parliament. His party's parliamentary group will undergo significant changes. Hungary's Orban will not sit in parliament after election loss.

articles.title: Arsenal narrowly beat Newcastle to regain Premier League lead over Man City
articles.summary: Arsenal beat Newcastle 1-0 to move three points clear of Manchester City. Nervy Arsenal beat Newcastle 1-0 in the EPL to move three points clear of Manchester City, who hold a game in hand.

articles.title: China Hints Its 4th Aircraft Carrier Will Be Nuclear-Powered
articles.summary: China announced plans to build its fourth aircraft carrier, which will be powered by nuclear energy. This move marks a significant development in China's military capabilities, as it was the last major country to adopt aircraft carriers.

articles.title: Sooryavanshi fastest to reach 1,000 runs in T20s as teenager smashes 36-ball ton in IPL
articles.summary: A teenager scored a 36-ball ton in the IPL as Sooryavanshi reached 1,000 T20 runs. Sooryavanshi fastest to reach 1,000 runs in T20s as teenager smashes 36-ball ton in IPL.

articles.title: सियासी चक्रव्यूह में आंकड़ों का इंद्रजाल, वोटर लिस्ट की सफाई ने आखिर किसकी विदाई की लिखी पटकथा?
articles.summary: पश्चिम बंगाल चुनाव में वोटर लिस्ट की सफाई के बाद तृणमूल कांग्रेस और भाजपा के बीच सियासी चक्रव्यूह में आंकड़ों का इंद्रजाल बन गया है। इसने कुछ लोगों की विदाई की पटकथा लिखी है।

hi.title: सियासी चक्रव्यूह में आंकड़ों का इंद्रजाल, वोटर लिस्ट की सफाई ने आखिर किसकी विदाई की लिखी पटकथा?

articles.summary: जलवायु परिवर्तन के कारण मधुमक्खियों का जीवन चक्र बदल रहा है, जिससे खाद्य सुरक्षा पर संकट बढ़ रहा है। उनकी प्रजनन क्षमता घट रही है, जो पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र के लिए खतरा है।

articles.summary: दुनिया के 100 शहरों में से 92 शहर भारत में हैं जहां तापमान 40 डिग्री से ऊपर है। उत्तर प्रदेश का बांदा शहर सबसे गर्म है, जबकि दिल्ली, मुंबई और चेन्नई भी इस सूची में हैं।

articles.title: ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर बोले ट्रंप- 'मैंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है'
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प ने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर कहा कि उन्होंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है। यह बयान इस्लामाबाद में ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच जारी तनाव के बीच आया है। ट्रम्प की टिप्पणी ने पश्चिम एशिया में स्थिति को और भी जटिल बना दिया है।

articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान पश्चिम एशिया में अपनी रणनीतियों पर अड़े हुए हैं। अमेरिका लक्ष्य से दूर खड़ा है, जबकि ईरान थकाऊ रणनीति अपना रहा है। इससे क्षेत्र में स्थिति और जटिल हो गई है।

articles.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?
articles.summary: भारत ने अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के हमलों पर नपी-तुली प्रतिक्रिया दी है। विपक्षी पार्टी कांग्रेस ने मोदी सरकार की प्रतिक्रिया को कमजोर बताया है। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने वाले पोस्ट को लेकर कई प्रतिक्रियाएं आ रही हैं.
